narrative:
Crestline Ex Vill Sd (Crawford) exempted village school district has 3,236 registered voters, with 61.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.8%, a modest Republican lean of 4.4 percentage points.
